branch.branch_summary: Define the first v7.0 slice: session-event-record schema, runtime-event-stream schema, local event writer, session-observability-audit, and Mission Control projection for reconstructable agent session activity.

tree_answer.where_are_we: The runtime is between v6.9 and the next concrete branch.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Evaluate v7.0 Agent Session Observability as the next bounded frontier after v6.9.0; keep the first implementation vendor-neutral, local, file-backed, and focused on reconstructable runtime event streams.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Open an implementation task for the current frontier: Define the first v7.0 slice: session-event-record schema, runtime-event-stream schema, local event writer, session-observability-audit, and Mission Control projection for reconstructable agent session activity.
